'''Tal'kina''' was a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]] in the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]] and the sensor officer of the ''[[Swift Liberty]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]'' {{1st}}
